> let me refactor the auth middleware to extract the token validation into a helper

I'll refactor the auth middleware. Let me first read the current implementation
to understand the surface area.

  Read(src/middleware/auth.ts)
  ⎿  Read 84 lines

The middleware currently mixes JWT verification with role lookup. I'll split it
into two helpers and keep the public signature stable.

  Edit(src/middleware/auth.ts)
  ⎿  Updated src/middleware/auth.ts with 38 additions and 22 removals

  Bash(npm test -- --filter=auth)
  ⎿  Tests:  12 passed, 12 total

Done — extracted `verifyToken()` and `loadRoles()` as named exports; existing
`requireAuth` middleware now composes them. All 12 auth tests still pass.
